acceptance_evidence.criterion: Paired enabled/disabled config exists and is reproducible.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: PR #4246 added configs/benchmarks/issue_3465_topology_gate_paired.yaml and the fail-closed preregistration validator.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Same scenario/seed/planner contract is used across arms.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: PR #4246 validates topology_gate_disabled and topology_gate_enabled differ only by near_parity_diversity_gate_enabled while preserving planner, scenario, seed, and horizon pairing.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Corrective #3463 gate completed or waived before paired interpretation.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: PR #4465 integrated corrective packets #4388, #4411, #4426, #4435, and #4444 into the readiness contract and reports ready_for_paired_run.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Degraded or fallback rows are excluded or caveated.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: PR #4487 added the paired decision builder, excludes fallback/degraded arms from promotion evidence, and defaults missing paired_significant to False in real mode.

PR #3602 added near_parity_promotion_gate.v1; PR #4597 added this decision packet. Missing campaign evidence is classified as blocked instead of promoted, and real campaign summaries are classified by the same fail-closed report builder.

blocked_reasons: Campaign summary JSON is missing; provide a durable paired campaign summary before promotion classification.
